without_skill_failures: Both store registrations include MigrationsAssembly set to the host project assembly name
The FindClientByIdAsync method does NOT include a CancellationToken parameter (v7 target)
Registration calls AddInMemoryCaching() and AddClientStoreCache<T>() to wrap the custom store with caching
ClientStoreExpiration is set to TimeSpan.FromMinutes(5) or equivalent 5-minute duration
Configuration store calls MigrationsHistoryTable with the schema parameter set to "idscfg"
Operational store calls MigrationsHistoryTable with the schema parameter set to "idsop"
Both store registrations include MigrationsAssembly pointing to the host project
Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder
AddServerSideSessions is called before or alongside AddOperationalStore, not after it without the operational store
ICache<> is replaced with a distributed cache implementation via AddSingleton or similar registration
AddConfigurationStoreCache() is called after the configuration store registration
ClientStoreExpiration is set to 10 minutes via IdentityServerOptions.Caching
ResourceStoreExpiration is set to 10 minutes via IdentityServerOptions.Caching
Client entities are added using the .ToEntity() extension method
The worker class injects or resolves TokenCleanupService from Duende.IdentityServer.EntityFramework
The ExecuteAsync method calls CleanupGrantsAsync() in a while loop that respects the CancellationToken
The store is registered using AddClientStore<T>() on the IdentityServer builder, not directly via AddTransient
An ITenantContext interface (or equivalent) is defined or referenced that exposes the current tenant identifier
Program.cs does not call AddOperationalStore for EF Core since custom stores replace it
Program.cs sets FuzzTokenCleanupStart = true on the operational store options
Program.cs sets DefaultSchema = 'config' or similar on the configuration store options
Program.cs sets DefaultSchema = 'ops' or similar on the operational store options
Program.cs calls MigrationsHistoryTable for at least one of the stores with a custom table name and schema
